heading: ADDITIONAL STATE AID FOR CERTAIN AD VALOREM TAX REFUNDS
operative_text: For each school year, a school district, including a school district that is otherwise ineligible for state aid under this chapter, is entitled to state aid in an amount equal to the amount of all tax refunds provided under Section 26.1115(c), Tax Code.
_note: No defined terms in this section. Enactment clause (Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., 2nd C.S., Ch. 12 (S.B. 8), Sec. 7, eff. January 1, 2022) omitted from operative_text as it is a procedural/legislative history provision rather than operative law.
